metadata.title: Sneaking Through Mid to Secure a Clean 2-Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Took a quiet route through mid and caught the enemies off guard. Watch how timing and positioning helped land two quick kills. What’s your favorite sneaky move in VALORANT?

Drop a comment with your best sneaky play!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
metadata.cta: Drop a comment with your best sneaky play!
